hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    out = data.get('output', '')
    if len(out) > 3000:
        lines = out.split('\n')
        keep = [l for l in lines if re.search(r'FAIL|Error|●|\u2715|\u2717|expected|received|passing|failing|\u2713', l)]
        data['output'] = '\n'.join(keep[:80]) if keep else out[:3000] + '\n...(truncated)'
    print(json.dumps(data))
except Exception:
    pass
"
